data.title: SEC's Atkins: U.S. Ten Years Late to Crypto, Vows Quick Reforms
data.description:
SEC Chair Paul Atkins stated the U. S. lags ten years behind in crypto innovation.
source: https://coinpaprika.com/news/sec-s-atkins-u-s-ten-years-late-to-crypto-vows-quick-reforms

data.title: Analyst: Spot gold may reach $4,500 sooner than expected
data.description: Tim Watrey, chief market analyst at KCM Trade, said that the $4,500 price target for gold may be reached sooner than expected, but this will largely depend on how long trade tensions and government shutdown concerns linger in the market. Meanwhile, Federal Reserve Governor Waller, citing concerns about the labor market, has expressed support for another rate cut. Investors expect the Fed to cut rates by 25 basis points at its October meeting and again in December. Watrey also believes that the sudden increase in credit concerns among US regional banks has given traders another reason to buy gold. Driven by geopolitical tensions, aggressive rate cut expectations, central bank gold purchases, de-dollarization, and strong ETF inflows, gold has risen over 65% so far this year. (Gold Ten)

data.title: Binance Alpha will be listed on SubHub, with a minimum score of 220 points
data.description: Binance has officially announced that SubHub (SUBHUB) will be available for trading on the Binance Alpha platform at 18:00 (UTC+8) on October 17, 2025. Upon launch, users holding at least 220 Alpha Points will be eligible to claim a first-come, first-served airdrop of 320 SUBHUB tokens. The point threshold will automatically decrease by 15 points every hour until the reward pool is fully distributed. Claiming the airdrop will cost 15 Alpha Points, and users must confirm their claim within 24 hours on the Alpha event page; otherwise, their claim will be forfeited.

data.title: US Vice President Vance: Russia and Ukraine not ready to reach agreement on conflict resolution
data.description: U.S. Vice President Cyril Vance said Russia and Ukraine are not yet ready to reach an agreement on resolving the conflict. "Despite the aggressive diplomatic efforts of the president of the United States, getting to the finish line requires both sides to be willing to reach an agreement," Vance said in an interview with Newsmax. "Right now, despite the tremendous work we've done and will continue to do, the Russians and the Ukrainians are not in a position where they can reach an agreement."

data.title: The market capitalization of ORIGIN Protocol token LGNS has exceeded US$2.21 billion, and its liquidity has exceeded US$190 million.
data.description: On-chain data shows that the market capitalization of LGNS, the token of ORIGIN, a decentralized DeFi 3.0 protocol backed by the Anubis Foundation, has reached $2.21 billion. The on-chain pool on Polygon has exceeded $192 million, and the number of addresses holding the token has exceeded 1.5 million. According to official information, LGNS is the core asset of the ORIGIN protocol, which is based on an algorithmic non-stablecoin and aims to build a DeFi 3.0 financial ecosystem through six modules: LGNS (algorithmic non-stablecoin), A (stable settlement unit), A Pay (private payment system), DAO governance, RWA (real-world asset mapping), and a private and anonymous public chain.

data.title: Bank of Japan Deputy Governor: If economic and price trends meet forecasts, interest rate hikes will continue
data.description: Shinichi Uchida, Deputy Governor of the Bank of Japan, said that if the economic and price trends are in line with our forecasts, interest rates will continue to rise. (Jinshi)

data.title: IMF Chief Highlights Rapid Digitalization of Fiat Currencies
data.description: According to Foresight News, Kristalina Georgieva, the Managing Director of the International Monetary Fund (IMF), recently emphasized the need for countries to acknowledge the accelerating digitalization of fiat currencies. She noted that the adoption of cryptocurrencies is advancing at an exponential rate, urging nations to understand and decide how to integrate these digital assets into their financial systems.

data.title: Caixin reports that QMMM's major shareholder is Gui Bin, grandson of Cantonese opera master Gui Mingyang, with a stake valued at US$985 million.
data.description: According to Caixin, Kwai Bun, the 47-year-old founder, major shareholder, and CEO of QMMM, a Hong Kong-based cryptocurrency treasury company that was ordered to suspend trading by the US SEC, is from an artistic family. His grandfather was Gui Mingyang, a master of one of the five major schools of Cantonese opera. As QMMM's largest shareholder, his latest annual report shows that Kwai Bun holds 8.25 million shares. Based on the pre-suspension price of $119.4 per share, his holdings are worth $985 million. Hong Kong media outlets contacted Kwai Bun after QMMM's suspension, but he immediately hung up after realizing the call was from a reporter. QMMM had previously reported plans to establish a diversified cryptocurrency treasury with an initial size of $100 million. However, its Hong Kong headquarters was recently found to be deserted. Upon contacting staff at another nearby company, they claimed the company had relocated in September and were unaware of the relocation.

data.title: Andrew Kang's associated address shorted 22,271 ETH with 25x leverage, equivalent to approximately $86.74 million.
data.description: According to MLM monitoring, an address associated with Mechanism Capital partner Andrew Kang is currently shorting 22,271 ETH with 25x leverage, equivalent to approximately $86.74 million, at an average price of $3,926.95, with a current unrealized profit of $760,000. Additionally, the address holds a $5.71 million short position in SOL and a $590,000 long position in ENA.

data.title: Pudgy Penguins forms strategic partnership with bipartisan public affairs firm Invariant
data.description: Igloo Inc. announced a partnership with Invariant, a bipartisan public affairs firm, to introduce Pudgy Penguins and the PENGU project to U.S. policymakers. The renowned NFT project, Pudgy Penguins, plans to leverage its professional government relations services to build a bridge of communication in Washington, D.C., and contribute to improving the regulatory environment for the cryptocurrency industry.

data.title: A whale lowered its ETH limit buy order to $3660-3710, a $100 decrease from the original order price.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi's monitoring, the whale who had previously placed a limit buy order readjusted the price range when the price fell early this morning. The latest ETH bottom-fishing expectation is "US$3660-3710". At this point, he plans to buy US$11 million, which is US$100 lower than the original order price.
